description_long: This is a compact, single-seat military airplane with a distinctive mid-mounted straight wing design and a V-tail configuration. The fuselage is painted in a camouflage pattern with green, brown, and gray tones, and features white cross insignias and a red number '5' on the side. The tail section is marked with a spotted gray and black pattern and a colored band near the tip. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a single nose wheel, all of which are fixed and exposed. The overall design suggests a lightweight, agile aircraft, likely intended for reconnaissance or light attack roles.
description: A compact, camouflaged military airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a V-tail, and a front-enclosed cockpit. It features fixed landing gear and distinctive insignias and markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, cockpit canopy, fixed landing gear, and camouflage paint with insignias and tail markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the V-tail configuration, straight wings, and the spotted pattern on the tail section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, including the cockpit, landing gear, and camouflage, but from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the nose, cockpit canopy, fixed nose wheel, and the straight wings extending outward.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine mounted at the rear of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with two angled stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
